# INTENT

## User Request

Refine the active slug editor so the availability confirmation appears within the same line instead of below, and make the status coloring clearer. Keep the slug field, check, and random actions together.

## Requested Outcome

Improve the slug control UX so it feels cleaner, easier to scan, and more obviously interactive.

## Constraints

- Keep the change focused on the slug control UI.
- Preserve the existing dashboard/project visual language.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
